name: Trot Girls Japan
original_name: トロット・ガールズ・ジャパン
overview: “Trot Girls Japan” is an audition program that aims to crown the top diva by having contestants perform classic songs spanning the Showa to Heisei eras, covering genres such as folk tunes, mood songs, enka, group sounds, folk, new music, and city pop.

trailers.title: TROT GIRLS JAPAN【夢を叶える超オーディション開幕！】
